titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the News Clippings and Articles about Yale University
News Clippings and Articles about Yale University
titlestmt.author: compiled by staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:43

did.unittitle: News clippings and articles about Yale University
did.abstract: The records consist of national-level newspaper and periodical articles, collected by a newsclipping service, concerning various aspects of Yale University.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Public Affairs

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 4-C (YRG 4-C), Records documenting public information functions of Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: News Clippings and Articles About Yale University (RU 64). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: Microfilm (HM 155) is arranged in two series: I: 1945-1974 (19 reels); II: 1974-1983 (5 reels).

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of national-level newspaper and periodical articles, collected by a newsclipping service, concerning various aspects of Yale University.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Public Affairs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In boxes 1 - 4 the dates represent clippings dates.
In boxes 5 - 7 the date represents the date the packet of clippings was compiled.

did.unitdate: 1980 February 29-April 24; 1980 March 25-April 14; 1980 April 9-15; 1980 April 19-May 6; 1980 May 8-19; 1980 May 21-January 1
1983 May 31-November 28; 1983 December 7-1984 March 5; 1984 March 12-April 25; 1984 May 3-August 28; 1984 September 14-October 8

1984 October 22-November 5; 1984 December 6-12; 1985 January 8-27; 1985 February 7-March 7; 1985 March 19-April 12; 1985 April 23-May 21; 1985 June 10-August 21; 1985 September 12-October 21; 1985 November 19-1986 January 3
